name: PSQ Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I Unless the context otherwise requires, throughout this Annual Report on Form 10-K, the words PSQH, we, us, the registrant or the Company refer to PSQ Holdings, Inc. and its subsidiaries (as applicable). On February 23, 2023, PSQ Holdings, Inc. (now PublicSq. Inc., a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company) (Private PSQ) completed a stock-for-stock transaction to purchase 100% of the outstanding shares of EveryLife, Inc. (EveryLife), a Delaware corporation, in exchange for 1,071,229 shares ...
